column4: This should play before the animation of nahas waking up occurs

column2: Stop! There's something emerging out of the pile!
What is it..?
It looks like some sort of serpent.
Everything's combined with something else down here.
It's probably not just a snake. Be careful!
Ray, I believe you're best equipped to deal with this..?
I'm with you, Dame Rachelle.
Let's go.
Like a snake-goop-thing? I don't know.
I'm not sure. Stay close.
Dame Rachelle..!
Right!
I'm with you, let's go!
Stay behind me.
Of course. Please take care of... whatever this is... quickly.
Miss Ray..!
What is that thing?!
Another one of those blasted monsters. Stay behind me.
(...some sort of snake monster?)
Whoah, whoah! What is that thing?!
It looks like some sort of serpent, but it won't be just that.
Everything's combined with something else down here.
It's probably not just a snake. Be careful!
Lady cleric, I'll leave this one to you..!
Of-fucking-course you will.
Um, Magda, I'm not sure this thing's friendly!
There's no way it is. Get ready.
(Are you fucking kidding me? So these things can come back
from within the goop as well? Sure, why not! What else can happen?)
